TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Taur_Matan_Ruak, title = Taur_Matan_Ruak, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taur_Matan_Ruak} }

S.FORM: ((biru' na zayzyuwaw:President Taur Matan Ruak.jpg|thumb|Taur Matan Ruak|alt=) Taur Matan Ruak ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 10, Taur Matan Ruak, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Timor-leste ta' misuw hya' ga Taur Matan Ruak, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

((biru' na zayzyuwaw:President Taur Matan Ruak.jpg|thumb|Taur Matan Ruak|alt=) Taur Matan Ruak ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 10, Taur Matan Ruak, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Timor-leste ta' misuw hya' ga Taur Matan Ruak, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ((βiruʔ na zajzjuwaw:pres~ɕi*ent taur matan ruak.jpɣ|tħumβ|taur matan ruak|alt=) taur matan ruak rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, taur matan ruak, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw timor-les~ɕte taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa taur matan ruak, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
